plugin_description: Prayer times with live countdown, notifications, and azan.
panel.title: Prayer Times
settings.city.label: City
settings.city.description: Your city name in English (e.g. London).
settings.country.label: Country
settings.country.description: Country name or 2-letter code (e.g. UK, DZ, FR).
settings.method.label: Calculation Method
settings.method.description: Choose the calculation authority followed in your region.
settings.method.russia: Spiritual Administration of Muslims of Russia
settings.school.label: Asr Calculation School
settings.school.description: Shafi/Maliki/Hanbali uses shadow factor 1. Hanafi uses factor 2, giving a later Asr.
settings.hijriDayOffset.label: Hijri Day Adjustment
settings.hijriDayOffset.description: Shift the displayed Hijri day if the API date doesn't match your local moon sighting.
settings.twelveHourFormat.label: 12-Hour Format
settings.twelveHourFormat.description: Show prayer times in 12-hour format (e.g. 5:23 AM) instead of 24-hour.
settings.showNotifications.label: Prayer notifications
settings.showNotifications.description: Show a system notification when each prayer time begins.
settings.playAzan.label: Play Azan
settings.playAzan.description: Play an azan audio file when each prayer time begins.
settings.azanFile.label: Azan audio
settings.azanFile.description: Which azan to play. Name your files azan1.mp3 / azan2.mp3 / azan3.mp3 and place them in the plugin's assets/ folder (see README).
settings.tune.label: Enable per-prayer time offsets
settings.tune.description: Apply per-prayer minute adjustments to fine-tune times.
settings.tuneFajr.label: Fajr offset (minutes)
settings.tuneDhuhr.label: Dhuhr offset (minutes)
settings.tuneAsr.label: Asr offset (minutes)
settings.tuneMaghrib.label: Maghrib offset (minutes)
settings.tuneIsha.label: Isha offset (minutes)
settings.showCountdown.label: Show countdown
settings.showCountdown.description: Show a live countdown to the next prayer instead of the static time.
settings.showElapsed.label: Show elapsed time after prayer
settings.showElapsed.description: After a prayer begins, count up (+) for up to 1 hour.
settings.hidePrayerName.label: Hide prayer name in bar
settings.hidePrayerName.description: Show only the time or countdown without the prayer name.
settings.widgetIcon.label: Bar icon
settings.dynamicIcon.label: Dynamic prayer icon
settings.dynamicIcon.description: Show a sun/moon icon matching the current prayer instead of the fixed icon.
settings.textColor.label: Bar text color
settings.iconColor.label: Bar icon color
settings.activeColor.label: Active color
settings.activeColor.description: Color used when a prayer is happening now or in elapsed mode.
